composition.tagline: One sermon. A whole week of content.
composition.cta: Turn Sunday's message into a week of content — in your voice.
composition.title: ivangel in 60 seconds

beats.caption: One sermon, a whole week
beats.narration: Sunday's sermon deserves more than one morning. Here's how eye-vanjel gives it a whole week of life — in just sixty seconds.

beats.label: ivangel
beats.caption: Built for church teams
beats.narration: You pour your heart into one message a week. eye-vanjel turns it into a week's worth of content — social posts, devotionals and study guides — in more than fifteen languages.

beats.label: Create
beats.caption: Paste once, choose what you need
beats.narration: Paste in your sermon, pick what you'd like — posts, a devotional, a study guide — and choose your platforms. No prompts, no fuss.

beats.label: Generate
beats.caption: Written in your voice
beats.narration: One click, and eye-vanjel gets to work — writing in your church's own voice, learned from your style guide.

beats.label: Social posts
beats.caption: A full set, every platform
beats.narration: In under a minute, you've a full set of posts for every platform — ready to read, tweak and share.

beats.label: Devotionals & studies
beats.caption: Carry the message all week
beats.narration: Plus devotionals and study guides that carry your message right through the week — every word sounding like you.

beats.caption: Create. Connect. Community.
beats.narration: One sermon, a whole week of content. That's eye-vanjel — start your free trial today.
